name: MHALM V2 — Multi-Head Atlas Language Model
author: Alexandre Quemy
description: Geometric language model with 3 Stäckel coordinate encoders (Stiefel-enforced), 5 kernel readout heads (Nyström, Gabor, Laplacian, Tucker GL, Linear), 2-pass FFT SSM + causal attention in z-space, Weyl spectral init. 18.3M params, 13.0 MB artifact (int8+zstd-22). Closes 47% of the V1→transformer gap.
techniques: 5 kernel readout heads (Nyström Gegenbauer, Gabor, Laplacian RBF mix, Tucker GL, Linear)
2-pass temporal refinement: FFT SSM (cuFFT, Weyl spectral init) ∥ 8-head causal attention (RoPE, XSA)
Spatial + temporal paths combined at output (learned geom_scale gate)
